# navtracker multi-sensor sim-fixture generator — direct dependencies.

# Determinism depends on these EXACT versions (the checksum contract). Pinned,
# not floated. trafficgen pulls its own transitive closure (click, pydantic,
# pyproj, matplotlib, ...) — the fully frozen closure is in requirements.lock.txt
# for exact reproduction.

numpy==2.5.1

# --- analysis / learning-doc figures (NOT part of generation determinism) ---
pandas==2.3.3
